name: Code Backend Team
tagline: Backend-focused coding team — APIs, services, infra glue.

marketing.summary: Coding team focused on backend work: REST and GraphQL APIs, service-to-service orchestration, background jobs, and the glue that lives between a frontend and its databases. Complements Team-SIN-Code-Core (included free) and Team-SIN-Code-Frontend.
bullets: Database schema evolution and query optimisation

agents.summary: Shared with Code-Core for deploy handoffs.
Dedicated backend agent (currently scaffold — see SCAFFOLD_AUDIT.md).
